description: city and county seat of Santa Clara County, California, United States
description_wiki: San Jose, officially the City of San José (  SAN hoh-ZAY, -⁠SAY; Spanish: [saŋ xoˈse]), is the most populous city in the San Francisco Bay Area and Northern California, and the 12th-most populous in the United States, with 997,368 residents.

description: provider of fire and emergency medical services to the City and County of San Francisco, California
description_wiki: The San Francisco Fire Department (SFFD) provides firefighting, hazardous materials response services, technical rescue services and emergency medical response services to the City and County of San Francisco, California.

description: river in the United States of America
description_wiki: The Pajaro River (pájaro is bird in Spanish) is a U.S. river in the Central Coast region of California, forming part of the border between San Benito and Santa Clara Counties, the entire border between San Benito and Santa Cruz County, and the entire border between Santa Cruz and Monterey County.

description: American frontiersman and Union Army general (1809-1868)
